title: Spotify’s next frontier: fitness content
summary: Spotify is expanding beyond music and podcasts into fitness, offering workout videos, curated playlists, and Peloton classes to both free and Premium users. The move represents the streaming service's latest diversification into adjacent markets beyond its core offering.
content: Spotify is adding fitness as its next major category, launching workout videos, playlists, and Peloton classes inside the app for free and Premium users.

zh.title: Spotify的下一个前沿：健身内容
zh.summary: Spotify正在将业务扩展到健身领域，超越音乐和播客，为免费用户和高级用户提供健身视频、精选播放列表和Peloton课程。此举代表了这家流媒体服务向核心业务之外相邻市场的最新多元化拓展。

title: Govee’s multicolor ceiling light doubles as a low-res screen
summary: Govee has launched a $249.99 multicolor ceiling light that uses LEDs to display images, marking the smart lighting company's entry into display technology. The 21-inch Govee Ceiling Light Ultra is designed to illuminate larger rooms and represents the company's expansion into visual display features.
content:
The smart lighting company is having a busy month. After releasing its first solar-powered lights, a cordless table lamp, and an updated LED light wall over the past few weeks, Govee has announced a new multicolor ceiling light. Available starting today through the company's online store and Amazon for $249.99, the Govee Ceiling Light Ultra is larger than previous versions and for the first time uses its array of color-changing LEDs to display images.
At 21-inches in diameter, the new Ultra version of Govee's ceiling lights will potentially be better at illuminating larger rooms up to 30 square meters. While the cheaper 12- and 15-inch vers …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Govee彩色吸顶灯也可充当低分辨率屏幕
zh.summary: Govee推出了价格为$249.99的彩色吸顶灯，采用LED技术显示图像，标志着这家智能照明公司进入显示技术领域。21英寸的Govee Ceiling Light Ultra旨在照亮更大的房间，代表了该公司向视觉显示功能的扩展。

title: Spotify is partnering with Peloton for guided workouts
summary: Spotify is partnering with Peloton to offer Premium subscribers access to over 1,400 fitness classes as part of its broader wellness expansion. The streaming service is also featuring curated fitness content from creators like Yoga with Kassandra, Chloe Ting, and Pilates Body by Raven.
content:
Spotify has dabbled in customized running playlists, but now it's diving more firmly into the fitness space with curated playlists and content from creators like Yoga with Kassandra, Sweaty Studio, Chloe Ting, and Pilates Body by Raven. Not only that, but Premium subscribers will have access to over 1,400 classes from Peloton.
Spotify has already expanded well beyond its music roots, with audiobooks, podcasts, and video. So moving into fitness and wellness doesn't seem like a big stretch, especially since there are plenty of playlists out there built around exercise. But it does further crowd an already messy app.
Users will now have acces …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Spotify与Peloton合作提供有指导的健身课程
zh.summary: Spotify与Peloton合作，为高级订阅者提供1,400多个健身课程的访问权限，作为其更广泛健康扩展的一部分。该流媒体服务还展示了来自Yoga with Kassandra、Chloe Ting和Pilates Body by Raven等创作者的精选健身内容。

title: Is this Samsung’s upcoming wide foldable?
summary: Leaked images reveal Samsung's upcoming Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide with a passport-like design and dual rear cameras, expected to launch later this year. The wide-foldable form factor positions Samsung to compete directly with Huawei's Pura X Max and Apple's rumored foldable iPhone.
content:
The supposed “Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide” dummy unit can be seen in the middle. | Image by Sonny Dickson	

The wide foldable phone that Samsung is reportedly developing is expected to arrive later this year, and now we may have some idea of what it will look like. Leaker and journalist Sonny Dickson has shared images online of what he says are dummy units of Samsung's upcoming Galaxy foldables, including the "Z Fold 8 Wide" - showing a passport-like design that's primed to take on Huawei's Pura X Max and Apple's long-rumored foldable iPhone.
The leaked dummy unit suggests that Samsung's wide foldable will feature a dual-camera setup on the rear, down from three cameras on Samsung's other Z Fold phones. All three of the dummy units feature promin …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这是三星即将推出的超宽可折叠手机吗？
zh.summary: 泄露的图像显示三星即将推出的Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide具有护照式设计和双后置摄像头，预计将在今年晚些时候推出。这种超宽可折叠形态让三星能够与华为的Pura X Max和苹果传闻中的可折叠iPhone直接竞争。

title: The AI-designed car is taking shape
summary: The automotive design industry is increasingly adopting AI and advanced 3D visualization tools to accelerate the traditionally lengthy vehicle development process. This shift promises to reduce design cycles that have historically taken five or more years from initial sketch to production.
content:
The auto design world is full of advanced 3D visualization tools and VR sculpting platforms, but your average new car still enters the world as a sketch. 
Those sketches traditionally see endless iteration and refinement from all angles before being turned into 3D models by hand, some dying in the digital world, others sculpted into clay to better visualize lines and profiles. That's just the beginning of a design and development process that often takes a half-decade or more. 
That means many new cars hitting dealerships this summer were first sketched in 2020 or 2021, initiatives kicked off when alternative fuel incentives were widesprea …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: AI设计的汽车正在成形
zh.summary: 汽车设计行业越来越多地采用AI和先进的3D可视化工具来加速传统上冗长的车辆开发过程。这一转变有望将设计周期从初始概念到生产所历来需要的五年或更长时间大幅缩短。

title: Meet the players who lost big money on Peter Molyneux’s failed Legacy
summary: Peter Molyneux's play-to-earn game Legacy, which generated millions in NFT sales, effectively collapsed within weeks of launch. The failed project illustrates the risks facing hyped NFT gaming ventures that struggle to retain users and deliver promised gameplay experiences.
content: After millions in NFT sales, the hyped “play to earn” game was effectively dead in weeks.

zh.title: 在彼得·莫利纽克斯失败的Legacy中损失巨资的玩家
zh.summary: 彼得·莫利纽克斯的边玩边赚游戏Legacy曾产生数百万美元的NFT销售额，但在推出几周内实际上就崩溃了。这个失败的项目说明了受关注的NFT游戏项目面临的风险，这些项目难以留住用户并兑现承诺的游戏体验。

title: This touchscreen mouse is my over-engineering nightmare
summary: Turtle Beach's new $160 Command Series MC7 gaming mouse features a 2.25-inch touchscreen display designed for macros and app controls, though its placement risks accidental activation. The design echoes Apple's controversial MacBook Pro Touch Bar, raising questions about practical usability.
content:
Who’s asking for this? | Image: Turtle Beach	

Turtle Beach's latest collection of PC peripherals are so focused around touchscreen displays that the company even slapped one on a gaming mouse. The $160 wireless Command Series MC7 features a 2.25-inch touch display bar on the left side of the mouse, which seems to be located in just the right position for users to worry about accidentally hitting it with their thumbs.
The display bar is designed to function like a built-in Stream Deck, allowing users to assign customizable commands for macros, apps, and OBS controls. It also brings to mind the infamous MacBook Pro Touch Bar, which was easy to accidentally hit while typing until the feat …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这款触屏鼠标是我的过度设计噩梦
zh.summary: Turtle Beach的新款$160 Command Series MC7游戏鼠标配备2.25英寸触屏显示屏，用于宏命令和应用控制，但其位置可能导致误触。这种设计让人想起苹果备受争议的MacBook Pro Touch Bar，引发了对实际可用性的疑问。

title: Meta inks deal for solar power at night, beamed from space
summary: Meta has signed a contract with Overview Energy to explore space-based solar power delivery, demonstrating growing interest in orbital renewable energy. The partnership marks Overview Energy's first major agreement and signals Meta's efforts to secure alternative energy sources for its infrastructure.
content: Overview Energy's first contract with Meta is a small step toward a future of space-based solar power.

zh.title: Meta与太空公司签约获取夜间太阳能供电
zh.summary: Meta与Overview Energy签订合同，探索基于太空的太阳能供电，展示了对轨道可再生能源日益增长的兴趣。这次合作标志着Overview Energy首次重大协议，并表明Meta正努力为其基础设施获取替代能源。

title: Truecaller faces mounting pressures as its growth matures
summary: Truecaller, the Indian caller identification platform, faces slowing growth as it matures in its core market. The company is shifting toward subscription services, business-focused offerings, and new features to sustain momentum and expand internationally beyond India. This strategy reflects the challenge mature platforms face in emerging markets when seeking diversified revenue streams.
content: As growth slows, Truecaller is leaning on subscriptions, business services, and new features to sustain momentum beyond India.

zh.title: Truecaller 面临增长成熟带来的巨大压力
zh.summary: 印度来电识别平台 Truecaller 在其核心市场趋于成熟的情况下面临增长放缓。该公司正在转向订阅服务、面向企业的产品和新功能，以保持势头并扩大国际业务。这一战略反映了成熟平台在新兴市场中寻求多元化收入流时面临的挑战。
